metadata.name: Update Supply Plan for Production Outage

description: A major equipment failure will take a production unit offline for 2 weeks. The supply planner must adjust the supply plan to mitigate customer impact.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the unplanned outage notification and its expected duration.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies the affected production unit and the 2-week downtime.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the impact of the lost production on finished product inventory and open sales orders.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies 5 customer orders that will be delayed if no action is taken.

nodes.task_description: Check for alternative production lines or inventory at other sites and update the supply plan to use these sources to cover the shortfall.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent reallocates inventory from another warehouse to cover the most critical orders.
